vocab.sentence: I want a hot dog for lunch.
I want some bread and milk.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我想要一些麵包和牛奶。

vocab.sentence: I want some juice. It is yummy.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我想要一些果汁。它很好喝。

vocab.sentence: What do you want? I want milk.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 你想要什麼？我想要牛奶。

vocab.sentence: I want a cupcake. It looks yummy!
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我想要一個杯子蛋糕。它看起來好吃！

phrases.sentence: Here you are. Enjoy your food!

tips.label: What do you want?
tips.text: 詢問「你想要什麼？」用 What do you want? 回答用 I want + 名詞。

tips.label: a / some + 名詞
tips.text: 可數名詞（一個）用 a/an；可數名詞（多個）加數字；不可數名詞（液體、粉狀等）用 some。

notes.title: What do you want?（詢問想要什麼）
notes.rule: What do you want? I want + 名詞.
notes.description: 用 What do you want? 詢問對方想要的東西。回答用 I want + 名詞。
examples: What do you want? I want a hot dog.
What do you want? I want some juice.
What do you want? I want two eggs.
What do you want? I want some milk.

notes.title: a/an vs. some（冠詞用法）
notes.rule: 可數（單數）用 a/an；可數（複數）用數字；不可數用 some
notes.description: a hot dog（一個，可數單數）；two eggs（兩個，可數複數）；some juice（一些，不可數）。

quiz.question: What do you ___? I want some milk.
quiz.hint: do 後面動詞用原形 want。

quiz.question: What do you want? I want ___ hot dog.
quiz.hint: hot dog 是可數名詞，一個用 a。

quiz.question: What do you want? I want ___ juice.
quiz.hint: juice 是不可數名詞，用 some。

quiz.question: Which word means 麵包？
quiz.hint: bread = 麵包。

quiz.question: What ___ you want? I want some tea.
quiz.hint: What do you want? 固定句型。

quiz.question: Which word means 牛奶？
quiz.hint: milk = 牛奶。

quiz.question: I want ___ eggs.
quiz.hint: 可數複數前用數字 two。

quiz.question: Which word means 茶？
quiz.hint: tea = 茶。

quiz.question: What do you want? ___ want some bread.
quiz.hint: 回答 What do you want? 用 I want...

quiz.question: What do you want? I want ___ egg.
quiz.hint: egg 以母音開頭，一個用 an。

quiz.question: Which word means 果汁？
quiz.hint: juice = 果汁。

quiz.question: I want ___ milk.
quiz.hint: milk 是不可數名詞，用 some。

quiz.question: What do you want? I ___ some juice.
quiz.hint: I want 是固定用法，動詞原形。

quiz.question: Which word means 熱狗？
quiz.hint: hot dog = 熱狗。

quiz.question: I want two ___.
quiz.hint: 可以數的才能用 two，eggs（雞蛋）可數。

quiz.question: What ___ you want? I want a hot dog.
quiz.hint: What do you want? 固定句型。

quiz.question: I want some ___.
quiz.hint: some 搭配不可數名詞，tea 是不可數。

quiz.question: What do you want? I want ___ hot dogs.
quiz.hint: 可數複數前用數字 two。

quiz.question: Which word means 杯子蛋糕？
quiz.hint: cupcake = 杯子蛋糕。

quiz.question: I want some ___.
quiz.hint: juice 是不可數，搭配 some。

quiz.question: What do you want? ___ want a cupcake.
quiz.hint: 回答 What do you want? 主詞用 I。

quiz.question: I want ___ bread.
quiz.hint: bread 是不可數名詞，用 some。

quiz.question: What do you want? I want two ___.
quiz.hint: two 後面要用複數可數名詞，eggs 符合。

quiz.question: Which sentence is correct?
quiz.hint: milk 是不可數，用 some milk 正確。

quiz.question: What do you want? I want some ___.
quiz.hint: some 搭配不可數名詞，tea 不可數。

quiz.question: I want ___ hot dog.
quiz.hint: hot dog 可數單數，用 a。

quiz.question: What do ___ want? I want some bread.
quiz.hint: 回答是 I want，所以是問 you。

quiz.question: I want ___ eggs.
quiz.hint: 可數複數前用數字 two。

quiz.question: What do you want? I want ___ milk.
quiz.hint: milk 是不可數名詞，用 some。

quiz.question: Which sentence is WRONG?
options: D. I want a hot dog.
quiz.hint: bread 是不可數，應用 some bread。

quiz.question: What do you want? I want ___ cupcake.
quiz.hint: cupcake 可數單數，用 a。

quiz.question: Which word means 雞蛋？
quiz.hint: egg = 雞蛋。

quiz.question: I want some ___.
quiz.hint: some 搭配不可數名詞，tea 不可數。

quiz.question: I want ___ eggs. （兩個）
quiz.hint: 兩個可數複數名詞用 two。

quiz.question: 「你想要什麼？」用英文怎麼說？
quiz.hint: What do you want? 固定句型。

quiz.question: I want ___ juice.
quiz.hint: juice 不可數，用 some。

quiz.question: What do you want? I ___ some tea.
quiz.hint: I want 動詞用原形 want。

quiz.question: I want ___ bread.
quiz.hint: bread 不可數，用 some。

quiz.question: What do you want? I want ___ egg.
quiz.hint: egg 以母音開頭，一個用 an。

quiz.question: Which sentence is correct?
quiz.hint: What do you want? 是固定正確句型。

quiz.question: I want ___ milk.
quiz.hint: milk 不可數，用 some。

quiz.question: What do you want? I want a ___.
quiz.hint: a 搭配可數單數名詞，hot dog 符合。

quiz.question: I want two ___.
quiz.hint: two 後用可數複數，hot dogs 符合。

quiz.question: What do you want? I want some ___.
quiz.hint: some 搭配不可數，tea 是不可數。

quiz.question: ___ you want some bread? Yes, please.
quiz.hint: Do you want...? 詢問想要與否。

quiz.question: I want ___ cupcakes. （兩個）
quiz.hint: 兩個可數複數用 two。

quiz.question: What do you want? I ___ some juice.
quiz.hint: I want 動詞原形 want。

quiz.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: A. I want some eggs? No.
quiz.hint: bread 不可數，some bread 正確。

quiz.question: I want ___ hot dog.
quiz.hint: hot dog 可數單數，用 a。

quiz.question: What do you want? I want ___ milk.
quiz.hint: milk 不可數，用 some。

grammar.sentence: What do you want?
I want a hot dog.
I want two eggs.
I want some juice.
I want some milk.
I want some bread.
I want a cupcake.
I want some tea.
What do you want? I want a hot dog.

grammar.sentence_chinese: 你想要什麼？我想要一些牛奶。

grammar.sentence: Do you want some juice?
Yes, please.
Do you want a hot dog?
No, thank you.
I want a cupcake and some milk.

grammar.sentence: I want some tea and bread.
Do you want two eggs?
Yes, I do.
What do you want for lunch?
I want a hot dog and some juice.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我想要一個熱狗和一些果汁。

grammar.sentence: I want some milk and bread.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我想要一些牛奶和麵包。

grammar.sentence: I want two eggs and some tea.

grammar.sentence: Do you want a cupcake?

grammar.sentence: Yes, please!
I want some juice and a hot dog.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我想要一些果汁和一個熱狗。
